verse_text: May the Lord destroyall deceptive lips And the tongue that speaks boastful things,

links.context: Man has a relentless hunger for material gain, which he thinks will insulate him from misfortune; but wealth is false security. This deluded quest for self-sufficiency is described elsewhere as virtual atheism ([[PSA.11:4]], [[PSA.11:5]]). The yield is not security but death and destruction. There is no security other than in God.
